description_long: This food truck features a whimsical design with a large, sculpted ice cream cone, whipped cream, caramel drizzle, and cherries mounted on its roof, making it instantly recognizable as a dessert or ice cream vendor. The truck body is painted in a cheerful palette of teal, orange, and white, with playful graphics of ice cream cones and popsicles along the sides. A prominent service window with a blue awning is located on one side, accompanied by a serving counter for customer interaction. The front and rear of the truck display the 'Sugar Sack' branding, and there are additional decorative elements such as illustrated menus and logos. The vehicle has standard truck features including wheels, headlights, and side mirrors, and the overall build suggests a sturdy metal construction. The design is both functional and eye-catching, intended to attract customers in urban environments.
description: A brightly colored food truck with a giant ice cream cone and cherries on the roof, featuring playful graphics, a service window, and 'Sugar Sack' branding.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the truck's windshield, headlights, and the large ice cream cone sculpture on the roof, with the service window and blue awning visible on the side.
description_view_1: Rear-left view highlighting the back of the truck, the full length of the ice cream cone, and the rear signage, with less visibility of the service window.
description_view_2: Rear-right view displaying the side with the service window, blue awning, and menu graphics, as well as the large cherries and cone on the roof.
description_view_3: Front-right view focusing on the truck's front grille, windshield, and the dramatic roof sculpture, with the service window and counter partially visible.
attribute_signage: Sugar Sack logo and text, ice cream and popsicle graphics, illustrated menu posters
